---
title: "clean"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading Libraries

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```

## Loading data

```{r}
ncbi_data <- read_tsv("../data/01_ncbi_data.tsv.gz")
```

## Extracting relevant data from NCBI Data

First we extract all data we want to analyze from the data set

```{r}
# Extracting relavant data
ncbi_data_dirty <- ncbi_data |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  filter(col_1 == "ID_REF" | 
        col_1 == "!Sample_characteristics_ch1" | 
        str_detect(col_1,"ILMN"))


# View sampled data (dirty) 
ncbi_data_dirty

```

## Data Wrangling
